pv_check_3.name: per_axis_decomposition_components_rate_seg_pose_exist_separately
pv_check_3.rationale: Even on sister archive 6bae0201fb08, the per-axis decomposition is structurally DEGENERATE on the pose component: CUDA pose column is uniformly 0.0 (zero variance, single unique value); CPU pose column is also single-unique-value at 2.66e-08. Cannot apply equation #36 per-axis decomposition ΔPoseNet_axis(pair_i) when the pose component is structurally degenerate. The pose-axis amplification per equation #18 cannot be empirically resolved from this data source for per-pair-drop ranking.

pv_check_4.name: not_source_selector_inherited_authoritative_per_pair_data

per_pair_projection_from_aggregate_attem.method: uniform 297-byte slice per pair from aggregate-per-byte 178417-byte CUDA array
per_pair_projection_from_aggregate_attem.WARNING: This projection assumes UNIFORM byte distribution across DQS1 600-pair selector space — NOT empirically validated. The 31-unique-value count suggests structural byte-region granularity (~600/31 ≈ 19 pairs per unique value) consistent with shared rate-saving constants — strongly suggesting the projection is itself an INHERITANCE ARTIFACT analogous to DROP-MANY-BEAM-BUILD-1's source-selector-inherited bug class.

empirical_evidence.rationale: No fec6 600-pair per-pair table exists in canonical ledger. Available per-pair tables are limited to A1 and PR101_LC_V2 substrates at 8-pair diagnostic subset depth. The aggregate-per-byte fec6 CUDA + CPU arrays exist for sister archive 6bae0201fb08 (NOT target 7a0da5d0fc32) but uniform slice projection from aggregate-per-byte to per-pair (31 unique values across 600 pairs) is structurally identical to the DROP-MANY-BEAM-BUILD-1 source-selector-inheritance artifact bug class.

drop_many_beam_build_1_precedent_paralle.structural_extinction_value_per_catalog_: PV gate caught this bug class BEFORE any artifact .npz/.json population attempt; saved structural confidence in canonical equation candidate cuda_axis_dqs1_per_axis_pareto_pair_ordering_v1 by NOT contaminating its RATIFY-N protocol with artifact-dominant per-axis pair-delta table.
